title: selaginella tama-montana
intro: Selaginella tama-montana, a species of spore-producing plant commonly known as a resurrection fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Selaginella tama-montana include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce blood pressure, and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, Selaginella tama-montana is often used in traditional medicine to make teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be consumed to promote overall well-being and reduce the risk of chronic diseases.
